notes.zerotrak_rating: Elo-based difficulty from zerotrac/leetcode_problem_rating. Only contest problems are rated. Null means classic/non-contest problem — use lc_difficulty as proxy.
notes.core_candidate: Good teaching problem for the Core portion of a COD — cleanly demonstrates the pattern with minimal noise.
